case_title: BALVANT V PATEL VS. GLENDA MARCELINO

docket_entries.description: UNDER APPLICATION TO THE CLERK FOR JUDGMENT UNDER SEC 1169 C.C.P., IT IS ADJUDGED THAT PLAINTIFF PATEL, BALVANT V RECOVER FROM DEFENDANT MARCELINO, GLENDA THE RESTITUTION AND POSSESSION OF THE PREMISES: 908 POST ST. #17, SAN FRANCISCO, CA 94109-5812, SEE SCANNED DOCUMENT
DECLARATION OF DAILY RENTAL VALUE $28.57 FILED BY PLAINTIFF PATEL, BALVANT V
SUMMONS ON COMPLAINT, PROOF OF SERVICE ONLY, FILED BY PLAINTIFF PATEL, BALVANT V SERVED SEP-26-2008, PERSONAL SERVICE AS TO DEFENDANT MARCELINO, GLENDA
EXECUTION FOR POSSESSION OF REAL PROPERTY ISSUED TO SAN FRANCISCO COUNTY AS TO DEFENDANT MARCELINO, GLENDA
UNLAWFUL DETAINER - RESIDENTIAL, COMPLAINT FILED BY PLAINTIFF PATEL, BALVANT V AS TO DEFENDANT MARCELINO, GLENDA SUMMONS ISSUED, JUDICIAL COUNCIL CIVIL CASE COVER SHEET FILED
DECLARATION PER CCP 585D FILED BY PLAINTIFF PATEL, BALVANT V
REQUEST TO ENTER DEFAULT FILED/DEFAULT ENTERED, DECLARATION OF NON-MILITARY STATUS, COST BILL $230.00 FILED, CREDIT ACKNOWLEDGED $.00 AS TO DEFENDANT MARCELINO, GLENDA
AMENDED REQUEST TO ENTER DEFAULT FILED/DEFAULT ENTERED, DECLARATION OF NON-MILITARY STATUS, COST BILL $370.00 FILED, CREDIT ACKNOWLEDGED $.00 AS TO DEFENDANT MARCELINO, GLENDA
RETURN OF EXECUTION FOR POSSESSION OF REAL PROPERTY ISSUED TO SAN FRANCISCO COUNTY, RETURNED AND FILED, FULLY SATISFIED AS TO DEFENDANT MARCELINO, GLENDA

THE COURT ORDERED THE FOLLOWING JUDGMENT ENTERED: IT IS ADJUDGED THAT PLAINTIFF PATEL, BALVANT V RECOVER FROM DEFENDANT MARCELINO, GLENDA THE RESTITUTION AND POSSESSION OF THE PREMISES: DEFENDANT VACATED ON 10/15/08, $1,680.00 RENT, $370.00 COSTS, $542.83 HOLDOVER DAMAGES, TOTAL JUDGMENT $2,592.83, SEE SCANNED DOCUMENT
